name: recursive-coordinate
description: Coordinate local agents with atomic claims and private handoffs without changing the project.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local agents without touching the project.
interface.longDescription: Use repository-scoped private state for atomic exclusive claims, bounded leases, idempotent handoffs, and a read-only Mission projection.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Recursive Coordinate to claim the shared scope and coordinate this work without changing repository configuration or contacting a remote service.
